/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:THE PEOPLE MAKE AN ORAL MOTION TO DISMISS COUNTS 3 AND 4 AS DUPLICATIVE,/ARG&SUB/MO GRTD/WIT SWORN DA:JOHNNY TOMASELLO,COMPLAINING WITNESS/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1-SINGLE PAGE DOCUMENT DISPLAYING 4 INDIVIDUAL COLOR  PHOTOS THREE OF WHICH DEPICT INJURIES SUSTAINED BY THE WITNESS,/X:THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO DEFENSE EXHIBIT A AS FOUNDATIONAL FOR PURPOSES OF THE PRELIMINARY HEARING ONLY,/EXHMA:DEFENSE A- A CD CONTAINING VIDEO DEPICTING AN INCIDENT IN FRONT OF URBAN OUTFITTERS ON POWELL STREET IN SAN FRANCISCO, CA,/EXHMA:DEFENSE B- A PHOTO OUTSIDE OF URBAN OUTFITTERS LOOKING TOWARD  THE DOORS OF THE STORE,/EXHMA:DEFENSE C- A PHOTO OUTSIDE OF URBAN OUTFITTERS LOOKING TOWARD  THE DOORS OF THE STORE,/HTA1:1 AND 2/X:THE COURT FURTHER FINDS THE ALLEGATIONS ATTENDANT TO COUNTS 1 AND 2 TO BE TRUE, ACCORDINGLY, THE ALLEGATIONS ARE CERTIFIED TO THE SUPERIOR  COURT OF SANFRANCISCO, DEPARTMENT 22, FOR FURTHER PROCEEDINGS,/NB/DEFTCUST3/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT ON THE INFORMATION/DOP/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/
